name: onlinejourno-platform
description: OnlineJourno Platform — editorial intelligence for newsrooms.
author: Subhash Rai

scripts.db:migrate: for f in infra/migrations/[0-9]*.sql; do echo "-- $f --"; psql "${DATABASE_URL:-onlinejourno_dev}" -f "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.ingest: cd packages/ingest-py && uv run python -m onlinejourno_ingest.cli
